settings.text: Choose durability and longevity with our king size tall bed frame boasting a sturdy frame construction. Our king size storage bed with 4 drawers is expertly constructed to provide a durable and long-lasting foundation, offering reliable support. A sturdy bed with a tall headboard provides a stable platform for your king size mattress, distributing weight evenly and preventing sagging. A sturdy bed frame with storage ensures your mattress performs at its best, offering optimal comfort at night.

This type of furniture has a soft headboard that is not only padded but also tufted — which means the fabric is threaded together and secured with either a button or a knot. Choose the lavish king size bed with 4 drawers to experience visual appeal through button tufting. The tufted design tall headboard creates a padded surface, providing comfortable back support while reading, relaxing, or enjoying breakfast in bed.

Optimise your bedroom layout with our convenient super king bed frame with storage, designed for easy assembly. Our carefully constructed single and double bed frames with storage guarantee easy minimal maintenance, so you can concentrate on enjoying your comfortable and stylish king size storage bed. Most of our furniture can be cleaned with a damp cloth or mild cleaning solution, keeping your furniture looking fresh with minimal effort. Find more at our bed assembly instructions.

Maximise your bedroom space with our king size bed frame with storage options (storage divan base available on selected lines). Our king size ottoman storage bed combines style with functionality,
keeping your bedroom space organised and clutter-free. The storage that you choose will be dependent on the size and layout of your bedroom. One option is to choose a bed with storage, whether with storage drawers underneath or an ottoman bed where the storage space is accessed by lifting the mattress. Find your perfect bed frame with storage to suit your budget, style and storage needs here at Bedroomking.

Express Delivery

Need your new bed in a hurry? Choose our Express Delivery option at checkout and enjoy faster delivery within just 3 to 5 working days. Fast, reliable, and stress-free so you can enjoy your new bed sooner than you think.

5 Years Warranty

At Bedroomking, we stand behind the quality and craftsmanship of our beds, bedframes and mattresses. We provide you with a 5-years warranty when you purchase a new product from our range of divans, bed frames, mattresses, TV beds, bedroom furniture and kid’s beds to
ensure your satisfaction and peace of mind.

settings.testimonial: Purchased the upholstered bed recently and it has exceeded my expectations! The sleek design, premium materials, and attention to detail make it a true statement piece in my bedroom. The plush upholstery not only adds a touch of sophistication but also ensures a comfortable and restful night's sleep. Couldn't be happier with my purchase!
settings.author: Ethan Pane

settings.testimonial:
Absolutely in love with my new upholstered bed! The storage compartments are a game-changer, providing a practical solution for keeping my bedroom organized. The tufted headboard adds a touch of elegance and complements the overall stylish design. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a perfect blend of style and
functionality!
settings.author: Lily Alison

settings.testimonial: My upholstered bed is a dream come true! The plush fabric, sturdy frame, and meticulous craftsmanship make for an absolute comfort haven in my bedroom. The blend of luxury and comfort is unparalleled, and I find myself looking forward to bedtime every night. A perfect addition to my sanctuary!
settings.author: Kelly Afong

settings.heading: What is an upholstered bed?
settings.text: An upholstered bed is a type of bed frame that features a padded and fabric-covered headboard, footboard, and often side panels.

settings.heading: What materials are used in your upholstered beds?
settings.text: Our upholstered beds are crafted using high-quality materials, including durable hardwood for the frame and premium fabrics for the upholstery. We ensure that all materials used are ethically sourced and built to last.

settings.heading: How do I care for my upholstered bed?
settings.text: To maintain the pristine condition of your bed, we recommend regular vacuuming to remove dust and occasional spot cleaning for any spills. Always use a mild fabric cleaner and test on an inconspicuous area first. Avoid exposing the bed to direct sunlight for prolonged periods.

settings.heading: Is assembly difficult for upholstered beds?
settings.text: No, upholstered beds typically come with clear assembly instructions, and assembly is manageable with basic tools. Some models may also feature easy-to-assemble designs. We also provide assembly option for some little added charges.

settings.heading: Can I purchase an upholstered bed with a mattress included?
settings.text: Yes, you can select the size and type of mattress from our store. This option provides a hassle-free solution for those looking to upgrade their entire sleep setup.
